Package space.sunqian.fs.object.builder

Interface BuilderOperator

@ThreadSafe public interface BuilderOperator
This interface is used to execute the process of object creation and building for the target type through the following steps:
  1. Calls createBuilder() to create a builder for the target type.
  2. Configures the builder elsewhere.
  3. Calls buildTarget(Object) to build the final object from the given builder, maybe the final object is the same one as the given builder.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nonnull Type
    builderType()
    Returns the builder type for the target type.
    @Nonnull Object
    buildTarget(@Nonnull Object builder)
    Builds a target object from the given builder, maybe the final object is the same one as the given builder.
    @Nonnull Object
    createBuilder()
    Creates and returns a builder for the target type.
    static @Nullable BuilderOperator
    of(@Nonnull Type target)
    Returns an instance of BuilderOperator for the target type, or null if the target type is unsupported, using BuilderOperatorProvider.defaultProvider().
    @Nonnull Type
    targetType()
    Returns the target type of this BuilderOperator.

  • Method Details

    • of

      @Nullable static @Nullable BuilderOperator of(@Nonnull @Nonnull Type target) throws ObjectBuilderException
      Returns an instance of BuilderOperator for the target type, or null if the target type is unsupported, using BuilderOperatorProvider.defaultProvider().

      Note this method never caches the returned BuilderOperator instances.

      Parameters:
      target - the target type
      Returns:
      a new BuilderOperator, or null if the target type is unsupported via the default provider
      Throws:
      ObjectBuilderException - if an error occurs while creating the BuilderOperator

    • builderType

      @Nonnull @Nonnull Type builderType()
      Returns the builder type for the target type.
      Returns:
      the builder type for the target type

    • targetType

      @Nonnull @Nonnull Type targetType()
      Returns the target type of this BuilderOperator.
      Returns:
      the target type of this BuilderOperator

    • createBuilder

      @Nonnull @Nonnull Object createBuilder() throws ObjectBuilderException
      Creates and returns a builder for the target type.
      Returns:
      a builder for the target type
      Throws:
      ObjectBuilderException - if an error occurs during the creation of the builder

    • buildTarget

      @Nonnull @Nonnull Object buildTarget(@Nonnull @Nonnull Object builder) throws ObjectBuilderException
      Builds a target object from the given builder, maybe the final object is the same one as the given builder.
      Parameters:
      builder - the given builder
      Returns:
      a target object from the given builder
      Throws:
      ObjectBuilderException - if an error occurs during the creation of the target object
